contents: (** * Classify the path space of natural transformations *)
Require Import Equivalences HoTT.Types Trunc Basics.Tactics.
Variables F G : Functor C D.
(** ** Equivalence between record and sigma versions of natural transformation *)

Lemma equiv_sig_natural_transformation
  : { CO : forall x, morphism D (F x) (G x)
    | forall s d (m : morphism C s d),
        CO d o F _1 m = G _1 m o CO s }
      <~> NaturalTransformation F G.

goals.conclusion:
{CO : forall x : C, morphism D (F _0 x)%object (G _0 x)%object &
forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d), CO d o F _1 m = G _1 m o CO s} <~>
NaturalTransformation F G

{CO : forall x : C, morphism D (F _0 x)%object (G _0 x)%object &
forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d), CO d o F _1 m = G _1 m o CO s} <~>
NaturalTransformation F G

contents:
let build := constr:(@Build_NaturalTransformation _ _ F G) in
    let pr1 := constr:(@components_of _ _ F G) in
    let pr2 := constr:(@commutes _ _ F G) in
    apply (equiv_adjointify (fun u => build u.1 u.2)
                            (fun v => (pr1 v; pr2 v)));
      hnf;
      [ intros []; intros; simpl; expand; f_ap; exact (center _)
      | intros; apply eta_sigma ].
(** ** The type of natural transformations is an hSet *)
Variables T U : NaturalTransformation F G.
(** ** Equality of natural transformations is implied by equality of components *)

Lemma path'_natural_transformation
    : components_of T = components_of U
      -> T = U.

hypotheses.type: forall c : C, morphism D (F _0 c)%object (G _0 c)%object

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
components_of d o F _1 m = G _1 m o components_of s

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
G _1 m o components_of s = components_of d o F _1 m
forall c : C, morphism D (F _0 c)%object (G _0 c)%object

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
components_of0 d o F _1 m = G _1 m o components_of0 s

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
G _1 m o components_of0 s = components_of0 d o F _1 m
forall c : C, morphism D (F _0 c)%object (G _0 c)%object

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
components_of d o F _1 m = G _1 m o components_of s

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
G _1 m o components_of s = components_of d o F _1 m

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
components_of d o F _1 m = G _1 m o components_of s

forall (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d),
G _1 m o components_of s = components_of d o F _1 m

contents:
Lemma path_natural_transformation
    : components_of T == components_of U
      -> T = U.

Let path_inv
    : T = U -> components_of T == components_of U
      := (fun H _ => match H with idpath => idpath end).

Lemma eisretr_path_natural_transformation
    : path_inv o path_natural_transformation == idmap.

hypotheses.body:
fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x0 : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x0 = n x0) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

contents:
Lemma eissect_path_natural_transformation
    : path_natural_transformation o path_inv == idmap.

hypotheses.body:
fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x0 : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x0 = n x0) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

contents:
Lemma eisadj_path_natural_transformation
    : forall x,
        @eisretr_path_natural_transformation (path_inv x)
        = ap path_inv (eissect_path_natural_transformation x).

goals.conclusion:
forall x : T = U,
eisretr_path_natural_transformation (path_inv x) =
ap path_inv (eissect_path_natural_transformation x)

hypotheses.body:
fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

goals.conclusion:
forall x : T = U,
eisretr_path_natural_transformation (path_inv x) =
ap path_inv (eissect_path_natural_transformation x)

hypotheses.body:
fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x0 : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x0 = n x0) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

contents: (** ** Equality of natural transformations is equivalent to equality of components *)

Lemma equiv_path_natural_transformation
    : T = U <~> (components_of T == components_of U).

hypotheses.body:
fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

goals.conclusion: forall x : T = U, ?eisretr (?equiv_fun x) = ap ?equiv_fun (?eissect x)

hypotheses.body:
fun (H0 : T = U) (x : C) =>
match H0 in (_ = n) return (T x = n x) with
| 1%path => 1%path
end

contents: (** ** Tactic for proving equality of natural transformations *)

Ltac path_natural_transformation :=
  repeat match goal with
           | _ => intro
           | _ => apply path_natural_transformation; simpl
         end.
